human_task_name: SynAIpse CC1: separate recommendation effects from next invocation
objective: Implement the smallest typed, validated, additive harness-decision recommendation-effects projection so harness next exposes later-command effects separately while its Synaipse invocation projection remains pure read.

decision_frame.value: Make the earliest cold-agent ambiguity mechanically distinguishable at its existing decision/effect owner.
decision_frame.why_now: CC0 confirmed that legacy top-level decision flags and meta.execution describe the recommended action while synaipseState.invocationEffects describes the already-completed read-only next invocation.
acceptance_criteria: Every harness next decision carries one named versioned recommendation-effects projection derived from its existing recommendation fields and execution permission plan.
The projection carries recommendation authority, rollback posture, required evidence, and retry semantics without changing the existing top-level or meta.execution meanings.

Focused deterministic tests cover CC-EFFECT-001 through CC-EFFECT-004, including a read-only next invocation with a write-capable recommendation and a consumer/validator rejecting malformed recommendation-effects metadata.
The existing synaipse-state/v1 invocationEffects stays exactly pure-read and no recommended command is invoked by next.
dependencies: Pre-dispatch clean-worktree proof for harness next and focused tests at baseline SHA bfe275b09244cd44c63ae4cbb641b3630056d04f.
Only declared CC1 control artifacts make the worktree dirty before this Worker starts.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Prevent a consumer from reading a later recommended write, Git mutation, or external mutation as an effect of the already-completed next invocation.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One additive typed-and-validated meta.recommendationEffects projection at the existing harness-decision/next owner plus characterization and negative tests.

non_goals: Do not change top-level HarnessDecision fields or their legacy recommendation semantics.
Do not change synaipse-state/v1, contextUnknowns, context resolution, provider behavior, commands, routes, package exports, generated artifacts, or hosted state.
Do not execute any recommendation or introduce a command, search, index, memory system, persistence layer, or competing SynAIpse effect schema.
Do not commit, push, merge, rebase, reset, stash, clean, delete worktrees, or mutate external services.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/commands/next-agent-parity.test.ts src/commands/next-decision-meta.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Implement the smallest additive recommendation-effects representation at the existing decision/next owner.
Add focused deterministic accepted and rejected tests inside the declared CC1 surfaces.
Write only the declared Worker evidence artifacts.

stop_conditions: a required edit falls outside allowed_write_paths
